task_objective: Resolve the 3 in-plugin updater code review findings: Decky installer argument order, pending update install metadata reconciliation on startup, and release manifest asset name matching the release tag.
design_decisions: Changed invokeDeckyInstaller argument order to url, EXPECTED_PLUGIN_NAME, version, sha256, installType to match Decky loader frontend contract. Decoupled reconcile_pending_update_install from regular update check context reading (get_update_check_context), performing it exclusively on plugin backend startup (Plugin._main). Added release tag matching to release manifest filename validation in validate_release_candidate to reject generic or incorrect manifest asset names.
results: All validation checks passed, tests pass cleanly, formatting and type checking verify successfully.
